code:
import io
import string

mut found = false
mut answer = ""
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not found
      let t = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(t)
        answer = t
        found = true
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

if found
  println(answer)
else
  println("(none)")
end
